<function=python>

# Check what changed after clicking the right panel's www bar
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== Changes after clicking right panel www bar ===")
for r in range(len(before)):
    if before[r] != after[r]:
        print(f"Row {r}:")
        print(f"  Before: {before[r][35:60]}")
        print(f"  After:  {after[r][35:60]}")

# Check the right panel button area
print("\n=== Right panel button area ===")
for r in range(32, 51):
    print(f"Row {r}: {after[r][37:59]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
